valid_count = total_permutations - invalid_permutations.

total_permutations = factorial(n) / product( factorial(counts[i]) for all i )

invalid_permutations = 0 if counts[0] == 0 else ( factorial(n-1) / product( factorial(counts[i] - (i==0 ? 1 : 0 )) for all i ) )
